languages.text: {n}Омерзительная жижа вызывает резкий приступ тошноты. Не выдержав, вы сплевываете ее остатки обратно в бокал и шумно закашливаетесь.{/n}
{n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Омерзительная жижа вызывает резкий приступ тошноты. Не выдержав, вы сплевываете ее остатки обратно в бокал и шумно закашливаетесь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}
{n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}
{n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El repugnante mejunje te revuelve el estómago al instante. Escupes de nuevo en el cáliz lo poco que te queda en la boca y te pones a carraspear ruidosamente.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El repugnante mejunje te revuelve el estómago al instante. Escupes de nuevo en el cáliz lo poco que te queda en la boca y te pones a carraspear ruidosamente.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那令人作呕的淤浆让你的胃瞬间翻江倒海。你把嘴里的残余液体吐回杯中，剧烈地咳了起来。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}那令人作呕的淤浆让你的胃瞬间翻江倒海。你把嘴里的残余液体吐回杯中，剧烈地咳了起来。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cette mixture répugnante vous soulève immédiatement le cœur. Vous recrachez le reste dans votre verre en toussant bruyamment.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Cette mixture répugnante vous soulève immédiatement le cœur. Vous recrachez le reste dans votre verre en toussant bruyamment.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İğrenç çamur, anında mideni bulandırıyor. Kalanları gürültülü bir şekilde tükürerek kadehe geri püskürtüyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İğrenç çamur, anında mideni bulandırıyor. Kalanları gürültülü bir şekilde tükürerek kadehe geri püskürtüyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}その不快な汚泥に、あなたは即座に吐き気を催した。あなたは残りをグラスに吐き戻し、けたたましくむせ返る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}その不快な汚泥に、あなたは即座に吐き気を催した。あなたは残りをグラスに吐き戻し、けたたましくむせ返る。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die widerliche Brühe löst bei dir sofort Brechreiz aus. Du spuckst den Rest in dein Glas zurück und prustest vernehmlich.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The disgusting sludge makes your gorge rise instantly. You spit the remnants back into your glass and splutter noisily.{/n}
